articles.title: Hantavirus Alert: India’s Union Health Ministry activates precautionary surveillance; what travellers need to know
articles.description: India's Health Ministry has activated surveillance following hantavirus cases on the MV Hondius cruise ship, with eight probable infections and three deaths reported. While the WHO assesses the global risk as low, two asymptomatic Indian nationals are onboard. Travelers to South America are advised to take precautions against rodent exposure.

articles.title: Third leopard sighting in 7 weeks Raheja Heights
articles.description: A leopard was first spotted inside Raheja Heights on March 17, when CCTV footage captured the animal entering the parking lot and killing a stray dog. A second sighting inside the complex was reported on April 8 at 3am, when the big cat was captured on CCTV trying to take away another dog

articles.title: ‘Missiles, drones locked on US targets’: Iran warns of ‘heavy assault’ after tanker strikes in Gulf of Oman
articles.description: Iran's IRGC has warned of a "heavy assault" on US military assets and ships if Iranian oil tankers or commercial vessels are attacked in the Strait of Hormuz. This follows US forces disabling two Iranian oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman and an earlier exchange of fire near the strait.

articles.title: Vijay sworn in as Tamil Nadu CM: What did TVK promise ahead of Assembly polls
articles.description: Tamil actor Vijay's party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam, has taken charge as Tamil Nadu's new government. Vijay is now the Chief Minister. The party secured a significant victory in the state assembly elections. Their manifesto promised extensive welfare schemes for women, job opportunities for youth, and reforms in governance. This marks a major shift in Tamil Nadu's political landscape.

articles.title: ‘Aliens In Space Suits & Helmets’: MOST SHOCKING FBI Memo Exposes ‘4-Foot-Tall’ UFO Crew | Watch
articles.description: A newly declassified set of UFO-related FBI and Pentagon documents has reignited global fascination with unidentified aerial phenomena. Among the most startling claims are witness accounts describing possible “four-foot-tall” humanoid beings seen in connection with unidentified flying craft. The files, dating back decades, reference alleged encounters, strange metallic objects, and reports from individuals described as credible sources including military and law enforcement personnel. While no evidence confirms extraterrestrial life, the documents have fueled renewed debate over government transparency and unexplained aerial sightings. Officials stress that the reports are unverified and do not constitute proof of alien contact.

articles.title: Subrata Gupta, EC's Special Observer for SIR, Appointed Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari's Advisor

articles.title: Nancy Guthrie Case: Sheriff Nanos gives ‘really great’ update as he shares Mother’s Day message for Guthrie family amid mystery; watch here
articles.description: The search for Nancy Guthrie, mother of Savannah Guthrie, nears 100 days. Pima County Sheriff Chris Nanos confirmed investigators are making progress in the suspected abduction case. Nancy Guthrie vanished from her home in January 2026. The FBI and local police are involved. A hair sample was sent for analysis.

articles.title: Bokaro Truck Accident: 5 Dead, 20 Injured in Giridih Market Carnage
articles.description: A devastating truck accident in Giridih's Dumri block claimed five lives and injured over 20. The coal-laden vehicle, after hitting a motorcycle, ploughed through multiple vehicles and structures at Isri Bazar. Rescue operations were extensive, and the driver has been apprehended. Authorities are investigating the truck's entry into the crowded market.

articles.description: A Mumbai investment banker's viral post reveals he spends Rs 1.3 lakh monthly on just the basics. From rent and cabs to late-night food deliveries, his breakdown shows the true cost of city life.

articles.title: UK dead woman ‘put on trial’ as husband cleared over 2017 suicide, lawyer claims
articles.description: A prominent barrister has slammed the acquittal of Christopher Trybus in his wife's death case, arguing the trial unfairly focused on the deceased. Trybus was cleared of manslaughter and other charges after his wife, Tarryn Baird, died by suicide in 2017, having previously accused him of abuse. Critics contend this verdict reflects a systemic disbelief towards women reporting domestic violence.

articles.title: Mahanadhi: Everything about the family drama starring Lakshmi Priya and Swaminathan Anantharaman
articles.description: Tamil television serial Sakthivel has achieved a significant milestone of 781 episodes since its premiere in January 2023. This emotional family drama, starring Lakshmi Priya and Swaminathan Anantharaman, focuses on the challenges faced by four sisters and their mother after the loss of their father. The show continues to captivate audiences with its gripping storyline and relatable characters.
